title: Puerto Varas evalúa regular arriendos cortos tipo Airbnb
summary: Puerto Varas is drafting rules for short-term rentals, pushed by housing pressure and neighbor complaints near the center. The draft floats a registration requirement and a yearly cap on rented nights in some residential zones.
None of it is law yet, and a vote isn't likely before spring. If it lands, it hits whole-home Airbnb operators hardest, the exact model driving the yields these lake towns are known for.
context_slice: Hits whole-home operators most; long-term rentals are untouched.
Puerto Varas is your anchor town in X Los Lagos.
Nothing changes today; track it for the spring vote.

title: Frutillar lidera las alzas de precio en la zona lacustre
summary: Asking prices in Frutillar rose faster than the rest of the lake district last quarter, led by lakefront homes.
context_slice: Watch price/m² creeping above the town median.

title: Tasas hipotecarias bajan por primera vez en 2026
summary: Mortgage rates edged down nationally for the first time this year, a small tailwind for buyers.
context_slice: Cheaper financing tends to firm up asking prices.
